name: CliConfig
desc: CLI configuration loaded from cli_config.yaml or cli_config.local.yaml.

name: defaultBuildType
desc: The default build type (e.g. apk, appbundle, ipa).

name: defaultFlavor
desc: The default flavor used when no --flavor flag is passed.

name: defaultMode
desc: The default build/run mode (e.g. debug, release).

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: load
desc: Loads the CLI config, applying the priority order described in CliConfig.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: Runner
desc: Command runner that registers all available CLI sub-commands.

name: Runner.new
desc: Creates a Runner and registers all available commands.

name: addCommand
desc: Adds Command as a top-level command to this runner.

name: argParser
desc: The top-level argument parser.

name: commands
desc: An unmodifiable view of all top-level commands defined for this runner.

name: description
desc: A short description of this executable.

name: executableName
desc: The name of the executable being run.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: invocation
desc: A single-line template for how to invoke this executable.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: parse
desc:
Parses args and returns the result, converting an ArgParserException
to a UsageException.

name: printUsage
desc: Prints the usage information for this runner.

name: run
desc: Parses args and invokes Command.run on the chosen command.

name: runCommand
desc: Runs the command specified by topLevelResults.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: suggestionDistanceLimit
desc:
The maximum edit distance allowed when suggesting possible intended
commands.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: usage
desc: Generates a string displaying usage information for the executable.

name: usageException
desc: Throws a UsageException with message.

name: usageFooter
desc: An optional footer for usage.

name: menu
desc: Runs the interactive menu loop until the user selects Exit.

name: MenuItem
desc: A menu item pairing a MenuOption with an optional list of sub-options.

name: MenuItem.new
desc: Creates a MenuItem for option, optionally with nested items.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: items
desc: Sub-options shown when this item is selected, or null for leaf items.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: option
desc: The option this menu item represents.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: MenuOption
desc: Menu option definitions for the dart_cli interactive interface.

name: cliTitle
desc: Command name used by the args runner (e.g. dart_cli run).

name: description
desc: Short description shown in --help output.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: index
desc: A numeric identifier for the enumerated value.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: title
desc: Human-readable label shown in the interactive menu.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: values
desc: A constant List of the values in this enum, in order of their declaration.

name: firstLevelMenu
desc: Top-level menu structure displayed on the interactive main screen.

name: SpinnerBuilder
desc: Extensions for building spinners from nullable strings.

name: renderSpinner
desc: A Spinner using this string as its message, or 'Processing...' if null.

name: StringExtension
desc: Extensions on String.

name: firstLetterUppercase
desc: This string with its first character uppercased and the rest lowercased.

name: e
desc: Prints an error message in red.

name: i
desc: Prints an info message in blue.

name: printExec
desc: Prints the full Flutter command that will be executed, including any FVM prefix.

name: printExecDart
desc: Prints the full Dart command that will be executed, including any FVM prefix.

name: promptSelect
desc: Displays a single-choice prompt and returns the selected option string.

name: runCmd
desc: Runs cmd with args, showing a spinner while the process is running.

name: runDart
desc: Runs a Dart command, resolving FVM automatically if available.

name: runFlutter
desc: Runs a Flutter command, resolving FVM automatically if available.

name: runFlutterInteractive
desc: Runs a Flutter command in interactive mode, sharing stdio with the parent.

name: s
desc: Prints a success message in green.

name: t
desc: Prints a normal (white bold) message.

name: w
desc: Prints a warning message in yellow.

name: BuildCommand
desc: Builds the Flutter project as APK, App Bundle, or IPA.

name: BuildCommand.new
desc: Creates a BuildCommand and registers its flags.

name: addSubcommand
desc: Adds Command as a subcommand of this.

name: aliases
desc: Alternate names for this command.

name: argParser
desc: The argument parser for this command.

name: argResults
desc: The parsed argument results for this command.

name: category
desc: The command's category.

name: description
desc: A description of this command, included in usage.

name: globalResults
desc: The parsed global argument results.

name: hashCode
desc: The hash code for this object.

name: hidden
desc: Whether or not this command should be hidden from help listings.

name: invocation
desc: A single-line template for how to invoke this command (e.g. "pub get package").

name: name
desc: The name of this command.

name: noSuchMethod
desc: Invoked when a nonexistent method or property is accessed.

name: operator ==
desc: The equality operator.

name: parent
desc: The command's parent command, if this is a subcommand.

name: printUsage
desc: Prints the usage information for this command.

name: run
desc: Runs this command.

name: runner
desc: The command runner for this command.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: subcommands
desc: An unmodifiable view of all sublevel commands of this command.

name: suggestionAliases
desc: Alternate non-functional names for this command.

name: summary
desc:
A short description of this command, included in parent's
CommandRunner.usage.

name: takesArguments
desc:
Whether or not this command takes positional arguments in addition to
options.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: usage
desc: Generates a string displaying usage information for this command.

name: usageException
desc: Throws a UsageException with message.

name: usageFooter
desc: An optional footer for usage.

name: CleanCommand
desc: Runs flutter clean to remove build artifacts and temporary files.

desc: Runs this command.

name: runner
desc: The command runner for this command.

name: runtimeType
desc: A representation of the runtime type of the object.

name: subcommands
desc: An unmodifiable view of all sublevel commands of this command.

name: suggestionAliases
desc: Alternate non-functional names for this command.

name: summary
desc:
A short description of this command, included in parent's
CommandRunner.usage.

name: takesArguments
desc:
Whether or not this command takes positional arguments in addition to
options.

name: toString
desc: A string representation of this object.

name: usage
desc: Generates a string displaying usage information for this command.

name: usageException
desc: Throws a UsageException with message.

name: usageFooter
desc: An optional footer for usage.

name: dart_cli
desc: A custom Flutter development CLI tool.

name: cliTheme
desc: Shared theme applied to all interactive prompts in this CLI.

name: dartExec
desc: The resolved Dart executable prefix, FVM-aware.

name: flutterExec
desc: The resolved Flutter executable prefix, FVM-aware.
